title: Higher Yield or Consistent Dividend Growth? VIG vs. FDVV
summary: The Vanguard Dividend Appreciation ETF (VIG) focuses on companies with a long record of raising dividends, while the Fidelity High Dividend ETF (FDVV) leans toward stocks offering higher current dividend payouts.
